title: Sunlit Cobblemon Tweaks
description: Mixins, assets, and general tweaks for the Society: Sunlit Cobblemon Modpack!
body:
Pack mod for [Society: Sunlit Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/society-sunlit-cobblemon) that contains assets as well as any modpack specific tweaks that cannot be done using Kubejs (such as mixins). This mod isn't intended to be used outside the context of the modpack though there is nothing stopping you from doing so!

**Current tweaks**

*   Adds Pocket PC for on the go management
*   Adds Mon box, which spawns 6 Pokemon once a day when a player is nearby
*   Pokemon will be discovered by Cobbledex when defeated
*   Pokemon will have their seen/caught/shiny caught status in their name
*   Default cobblemonrider config expanded
*   Riding cobblemon will no longer take into account form (Hacky mixin for things like Paldean tauros)
*   Assets and namespace for the Sunlit Cobblemon modpack
*   Anything else
